behavior_changes.title: Bug 37757820: Generic - Enable NOCHECKUNIQUEKEYS as default for BATCHSQL for all Non-Oracle AI Databases
behavior_changes.description: Enabled NOCHECKUNIQUEKEYS as default for BATCHSQL for all non- Oracle AI Database .

behavior_changes.title: Bug 29709965: MySQL - Extract to skip XA transactions and log a Warning instead of Abend
behavior_changes.description: Changed the functionality in Oracle GoldenGate Extract for MySQL to skip XA transactions with a warning, instead of abending.

behavior_changes.title: Bug 37465578: MySQL - Change the default capture for Extract CDC to be remote capture
behavior_changes.description: Changed the default capture of Oracle GoldenGate for MySQL from local to remote capture for Linux-x64 platform.
